__calibration.seeded_disease: An unreadable site presented as an EvidenceBundle. bundles[0] is a bot-wall/challenge page (the carbonhealth.com/jarir.com class, caution.md C-038); bundles[1] is an unrendered SPA shell with zero visible text (the royalparkpartners.com class, caution.md C-032). Both shapes occur verbatim in eval/reference-set/fixtures/ as real fetched data.
__calibration.expected_failure: Any facts module fed either bundle MUST abstain on every fact (confidence 'abstain', no emitted values) and no breach/absence claim may exist. A checker that lets a fact or finding through on these bundles has not earned its zero.
__calibration.checker_contract: The checker runs each facts module against both bundles and reports a finding for every non-abstain fact or non-empty finding list.
